exp1_baseline.name: Exp 1: Baseline (Generic Labels)
exp1_baseline.description: Generic label text, simple yes/no question. Overall F1 80.1%
exp1_baseline.template:
Does this radiology report indicate {label}?

Report:
{report_text}

Answer with ONLY "yes" or "no".

exp2_clarified.name: Exp 2: Clarified Labels & Objective
exp2_clarified.description: Operationally precise label definitions, analytical framing. Overall F1 92.0%

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp3_criteria.name: Exp 3: Edge-Case Criteria
exp3_criteria.description: Clarified labels + explicit rules for negation, uncertainty, relevance. Overall F1 92.5%
exp3_criteria.template:
Analyze the following radiology report and determine: {label}

Report:
{report_text}

CRITERIA:
- Negated findings ("no tumour", "no evidence of") count as ABSENT
- Uncertain findings ("possible", "cannot exclude") count as PRESENT
- The finding must be clinically relevant, not incidental mentions

Based on the report, is "{label}" present or applicable? Answer with ONLY "yes" or "no" (lowercase, no other text).

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp4_few_shot.name: Exp 4: Few-Shot Examples
exp4_few_shot.description: Two examples prepended. Severe regression to 64.1% F1 — examples set overly conservative threshold
exp4_few_shot.template:
Classify whether this radiology report indicates {label}.

EXAMPLES:

Report: "PET FDG Whole Body. Findings: Increased FDG uptake in the known primary lung mass, now measuring 4.2cm (previously 3.1cm). New FDG-avid mediastinal lymph nodes."
Answer: yes

Report: "PET FDG Whole Body. Findings: No significant FDG uptake. The previously noted lung nodule shows no metabolic activity. Stable appearance."
Answer: no

NOW CLASSIFY:

Report:
{report_text}

Answer (yes or no):

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp5_evidence_first.name: Exp 5: Evidence-First (CoT)
exp5_evidence_first.description: List evidence before deciding. F1 82.2%, 8x slower — deliberation errors
exp5_evidence_first.template:
Task: Determine if this report shows {label}.

Report:
{report_text}

First, list relevant findings (one per line, or "None").
Then write: ANSWER: yes or ANSWER: no

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)

exp6_negative_prompting.name: Exp 6: Negative Prompting
exp6_negative_prompting.description: Explicit 'do NOT' instructions. Worst at 61.5% F1 — systematically conservative
exp6_negative_prompting.template:
Determine if this report mentions {label}.

IMPORTANT:
- Do NOT assume information not explicitly stated
- Do NOT confuse similar terms (nodule vs node, mass vs lesion)
- Do NOT answer "yes" unless there is clear evidence

Report:
{report_text}

Answer (yes/no):

labels.disease_progression: Disease progression (assuming no prior comparison data implies disease progression)
labels.nodule: Nodule (explicit mention of nodule, ignore nodes)
